title: Rhino Sensitive Edge Masking Tape, Pink, 24mm x 25m – Low Tack Painters Tape for Delicate Surfaces, Clean Removal (3)
features: LOW TACK ADHESIVE – Specially formulated for delicate surfaces such as wallpaper, fresh paint, plaster, or varnished wood, ensuring no damage or residue.
CLEAN, SHARP EDGES – Designed to deliver crisp paint lines for a professional finish, ideal for decorating and detailed painting projects.
EASY REMOVAL – Peels away smoothly without tearing, lifting paint, or leaving sticky residue behind.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE – Resistant to sunlight for up to 30 days, making it suitable for both indoor decorating and short-term exterior jobs.
GENEROUS COVERAGE – Each roll measures 24mm wide x 25m long, offering plenty of tape for DIY, crafts, and professional use.
description: Achieve perfect paint lines without damaging delicate surfaces with the Ultratape Rhino Sensitive Edge Masking Tape. Specially designed with a low-tack adhesive, this pink masking tape is ideal for use on wallpaper, freshly painted walls, varnished wood, and other sensitive surfaces. It removes cleanly without leaving sticky residue or lifting paint, making it the perfect choice for decorators, DIY projects, and crafts. Each roll measures 24mm wide x 25m long, giving you plenty of coverage for edging, detailing, and precision masking work. The tape provides sharp, clean paint edges and resists sunlight for up to 30 days, so it’s suitable for both indoor and short-term outdoor projects. Whether you’re redecorating at home or working on professional paintwork, Ultratape Rhino Sensitive Edge Masking Tape helps you get the job done right — clean, easy, and damage-free.
